title: shawia decurrens
intro: Shawia decurrens, also known as the Sambalai, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Shawia decurrens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and eczema. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for consumption in the form of a decoction or infusion, where the leaves are boiled in water to create a medicinal tea.
